ol.li:
Registration (Setup):
Invokes get_user_pages() to pin memory into RAM.
Increases locked_vm rlimit for the process.
Creates io_mapped_ubuf structures in kernel heap.

I/O Execution (Fast Path):
No copy_from_user of iovec structures per I/O.
No page table walk per request.
No memory allocation/deallocation in the I/O path.

Hardware Requirements:
Buffer must be page-aligned to prevent DMA crossing page boundaries.
Direct I/O (O_DIRECT) semantics apply.
